mapper.insert:
SELECT POST_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BOARD_POSTS ( POST_SEQ, TITLE, CATEGORY, CONTENT, USERS_ID, VIEW_COUNT, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{post_seq}, #{title}, #{category}, #{content}, #{users_id}, 0, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO BOARD_FILE ( FILE_SEQ, POST_SEQ, FILE_ORINAME, FILE_SYSNAME, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, UPLOAD_AT ) VALUES ( B_FILE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{post_seq}, #{file_oriname}, #{file_sysname}, #{file_path}, #{file_size}, SYSDATE )
INSERT INTO BOARD_COMMENTS (COMMENT_SEQ, POST_SEQ, USERS_ID, CONTENT, CREATED_AT) VALUES (COMMENT_SEQ.nextval, #{post_seq}, #{users_id}, #{content}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_POSTS
CATEGORY = '자유'
AND (TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR USERS_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')

SELECT b.POST_SEQ, b.TITLE, b.CATEGORY, b.USERS_ID, b.VIEW_COUNT, b.CREATED_AT, u.NAME AS AUTHOR_NAME FROM BOARD_POSTS b LEFT JOIN USERS u ON b.USERS_ID = u.ID WHERE b.CATEGORY != '자유'
AND (b.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR u.NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY CASE WHEN b.CATEGORY = '공지' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, b.CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT b.POST_SEQ, b.TITLE, b.CATEGORY, b.CONTENT, b.USERS_ID, b.VIEW_COUNT, b.CREATED_AT, u.NAME AS AUTHOR_NAME, u.SYSNAME AS AUTHOR_SYSNAME FROM BOARD_POSTS b LEFT JOIN USERS u ON b.USERS_ID = u.ID WHERE b.POST_SEQ = #{post_seq}

SELECT c.COMMENT_SEQ, c.POST_SEQ, c.USERS_ID, c.CONTENT, c.CREATED_AT, c.UPDATE_AT, u.NAME AS author_name, u.SYSNAME AS author_sysname FROM BOARD_COMMENTS c JOIN USERS u ON c.USERS_ID = u.ID WHERE c.POST_SEQ = #{post_seq} ORDER BY c.COMMENT_SEQ DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD_COMMENTS SET CONTENT = #{content}, UPDATE_AT = SYSDATE WHERE COMMENT_SEQ = #{comment_seq}
